title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama GitHub repo: the self-hosted LLM runner with a built-in model library, REST API and CLI.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; pip-installable wrapper around the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; npm-installable wrapper for browser & Node.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs & embedders.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured, self-hosted ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Terminal UI (TUI) for chatting with Ollama models, written in Rust.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG pipeline using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store, runnable in Jupyter.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat with and generate code using Ollama models inside the editor.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated Modelfile recipes for creating custom Ollama models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that lets you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to spin up Ollama services inside CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate providing typed bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that connects to a local Ollama instance with session memory.
